app.empty_hint_body: Pick or create a workspace first — every document and case lives inside one.

sidebar.footer: Not a medical device. Decisions remain with the clinician.

onboarding.subtitle: Local-first clinical decision support · v0.1
onboarding.body: Conclave is an experimental clinical decision-support tool. It is <0>not a medical device</0> and does <1>not replace the judgement of a qualified clinician</1>. Outputs may be incomplete, biased or wrong. Always validate recommendations against primary sources and institutional protocols before acting on them.
onboarding.ack: By continuing you acknowledge that you have read and understood the above and accept full responsibility for clinical decisions.

workspaces.empty: No workspaces yet. Create your first one from the button above.
workspaces.create_subtitle: Each workspace gets its own SQLite + vector store
workspaces.field_language_hint: ISO code · used by the verdict prompt

knowledge.pick_file_title: Pick a file or directory to ingest
knowledge.ingest_warming: Embedding model warming up — first run downloads ~470 MB.
knowledge.empty_docs: No documents yet. Ingest a PDF, DOCX, TXT, MD or HTML file to start.
knowledge.confirm_remove: Remove this document and its chunks?

cases.empty_title: No cases yet. Run your first virtual committee.
cases.new_subtitle: Paste a clinical note — it will be de-identified before any LLM call
cases.field_text_placeholder: 67-year-old woman with progressive dyspnea and lower-limb edema…
cases.provider_empty_body: Connect an AI provider to run the committee.
cases.deid_subtitle: Layer A regex + Layer C heuristics
cases.deid_hint: Paste a case on the left and hit <0>Preview de-id</0> to see exactly what will leave this device.
cases.no_verdict: No verdict on file for this case.

settings.interface_subtitle: Affects only the app · each workspace keeps its own verdict language
settings.ai_subtitle_empty: Connect a provider — you can change it whenever you want
settings.ai_subtitle_active: One AI active at a time · switch whenever you want
settings.ollama_running: is running on your Mac and you can use it from the cases screen without connecting anything.
settings.ollama_pending: becomes available automatically when you run it on your Mac — no connection, no keys required.
settings.ollama_secondary: Ollama (local) is also available for offline cases.
settings.apikey_field_hint: Stored in the system keychain. Never written to disk as plain text.
settings.oauth_anthropic_fallback: Open the browser, authorize Conclave, then paste here the code Anthropic gives you.
settings.oauth_openai_waiting_body: Complete sign-in and come back here — Conclave will detect the connection automatically.
settings.migration_title: Conclave now uses one AI at a time
settings.migration_body: We detected several active connections. Pick which one to keep — the others will be disconnected from your local account.
settings.keychain_note: Keys are stored in the system keychain · never in config files
